ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the competition starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the competition ends */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the competition (e.g., group stage, knockout stage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country representing the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the match is part of */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (win, draw, loss) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Score at half-time */,
  "full_time_score" TEXT /* Final score of the match */,
  "extra_time_score" TEXT /* Score at the end of extra time (if applicable) */,
  "penalty_score" TEXT /* Score from penalty shootout (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team in the competition */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team in the competition */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team in the competition */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team in the competition */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the competition */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the competition */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team in the competition */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal by the team in the competition */,
  "shots_off_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots off goal by the team in the competition */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team in the competition */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team in the competition */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the team in the competition */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Total corner kicks taken by the team in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being predicted */,
  "predicted_result" TEXT /* Predicted result of the match (win, draw, loss) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "predicted_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Predicted number of goals the team will score */,
  "predicted_goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Predicted number of goals the team will concede */,
  "predicted_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Predicted number of yellow cards the team will receive */,
  "predicted_red_cards" INTEGER /* Predicted number of red cards the team will receive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the report is about */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the report covers */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, tactical analysis) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, coach, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
